faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offer best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

faqs.question: Is Vellalar College For Women a good college/Institute?
faqs.answer: Vellalar College For Women is a well-known institution for M.A, M.Sc, M.Com, B.Sc, B.A, B.Com, MCA courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, Vellalar College For Women has a rating of 3.38 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.25 on Campus Life, 3.17 on Placements, 3.67 on Faculty and 3.25 on Infrastructure.

faqs.question: What are the courses that Vellalar College For Women offers?
faqs.answer: Vellalar College For Women provides programmes including M.A, M.Sc, M.Com, B.Sc, B.A, B.Com, MCA in streams such as Humanities & Social Sciences, Science, Banking, Finance & Insurance, Medicine & Health Sciences, Accounting & Commerce, IT & Software, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Botany, Zoology, Mathematics, Chemistry, Physics.

placements.overview: UG Degree (3 year) : In year 2018-19, for 3 year UG Degree, a total of 1765 students were admitted at Vellalar College For Women and 1661 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 1661 students 509 were placed with median salary of INR 300000 and 729 students opted for higher studies. A total of 1857 students were admitted in year 2019-20 for 3 year UG degree at Vellalar College For Womenand 1673 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 1673 students 403 were placed with median salary of INR 249996 and 761 students opted for higher studies. PG Degree (2 year) : In year 2019-20, for 2 year PG Degree, a total of 375 students were admitted at Vellalar College For Women and 352 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 352 students 34 were placed with median salary of INR 300000 and 23 students opted for higher studies. A total of 476 students were admitted in year 2020-21 for 2 year PG degree at Vellalar College For Womenand 437 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 437 students 68 were placed with median salary of INR 174000 and 53 students opted for higher studies.

faqs.answer: A:    Vellalar College For Women offers in-campus placement salaries in the range of INR 3 LPA to M.Com students.

reviews_list.review_title: Discipline over everything. This college gave me everything that I am now.

review_content.Placements: Nearly 40% of my colleagues were placed in reputed companies. They were placed in roles such as analyst, vice and non-vice processing roles. Top recruiting companies were Accenture, HCL, TCS, Omega, and others. They were doing pretty good in their careers now.
review_content.Infrastructure: Well-maintained labs with Wi-Fi connection were available. The library was a place where you would get the books you needed. There were lots of collections, and the library also had an internet-connected system so that you could read your e-books. The food and hostel could be improved a bit.

reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the faculty members as they are a gem. They are supportive.

review_content.Placements: Faculty and staff members provide great support for getting good internships and jobs. Many top companies like TCS and Wipro offer placement opportunities. A good number of students got placed, and today they are working with companies like TCS, Wipro, etc., because of such opportunities offered by the college management.
review_content.Infrastructure: The B.Com course has good labs. The college library is vast enough to get read wonderful books. The college has excellent sports facilities like a gym room and a vast ground for sports, and a basketball court. Students also receive prompt medical attention when needed. Overall, it's good.

reviews_list.review_title: My experience in this college.

review_content.Placements: Mostly in Erode district, 70% of girls get placed in our college because parents are choosing our college for safety and good education. My semester fee is only Rs. 15,000. Top companies like Infosys, TCS, and CTS get placed in companies. All students score above 75% in our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, the infrastructure is just awesome. There are many trees and natural places. We have a playground and a large stadium. Our classrooms are very clean and neat. The hostel food is nice. The hostel is also very clean and neat. Washrooms are so clean. They give importance to sports activities.

reviews_list.review_title: Interesting facts about my college.

review_content.Placements: More companies are providing placement classes on our campus. It is very good and packing excellent. Very eagerly waiting for the placement for the company. Top companies are providing good quality places. Internships are conducted on our campus and Swayam-like apps are doing the internship in a good way. Outside the campus, we are also going and doing the internship practically.
review_content.Infrastructure: On our campus, we have free Wi-Fi facilities and good connections. I am pursuing 2nd year B.Sc. Chemistry. In college, I like my Chemistry lab. It's very clean and disciplined in the lab. All the classrooms are clean and have fans, boards, cupboards, desks, etc. All the facilities are available in the college. The library has excellent books. More books are available in the college library, such as thesis, novels, storybooks, course-related books, general knowledge books, competitive exams books, etc. The hostel facilities are well-maintained. The food is awesome and of good quality and quantity.

reviews_list.review_title: As far as higher education goes, this college is excellent.

review_content.Placements: Sixty percent or so of students were placed after earning an M.Com. 1.5 LPA was the lowest salary offered, and 6 LPA was the highest. Among the top employers are TCS, HDFC Bank, SBI Bank, and so forth. After completing this course, 20% of students were able to secure internships. Accountant, Manager, Instructor, Assistant, etc., are among the top positions.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are smartboard-equipped classrooms, a good library, and a games room. The college's large classrooms with large windows help the students endure the summer heat. The restrooms are passable. The college exudes an artistic vibe and is quite old.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.A. in English Literature - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good facilities and a secure atmosphere characterizes the college.

review_content.Placements: Overall, 75% of the students got placed for internships. A total of 50 percent of students were placed in internships. This role of teaching is provided. There are plenty of opportunities in terms of employment since many companies visit our college for recruitment. Some students were employed by companies. As has been deduced, campus interviews are beneficial for many students. This is quite an achievement because in our batch, many students got placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: In terms of the facilities and infrastructure, the center is of high quality. There are no excellent hostel facilities here. These include the hostel warden, room and food facilities, which are not so good here. Mobile phones are prohibited on the campus.

overview_faqs.question: Is Gardi Vidyapith Group of Institutions a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Gardi Vidyapith Group of Institutions is a well-known institution for BHMS, B.A.M.S., MBA/PGDM, B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MCA courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Gardi Vidyapith Group of Institutions has a rating of 4 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4 on campuslife, 3.7 on placements, 4.1 on faculty and 4.1 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Gardi Vidyapith Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Review of Gardi Vidyapith Group of Institutions.

content.Placements: College was providing various placement opportunities to the students. Every year around 50% of students get successfully placed at our college. Top recruiting companies in our course were TCS, Wipro, Infosys, etc. In our college, top roles offered were developers, software developers, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure for our course in this college was good. All the types of facilities required in our course were provided to the students. College top facilities were Wi-Fi, computer labs, library, canteen, etc. Hostel facility was also given to students of our college.

individual_reviews.course: BHMS - Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of Gardi Vidyapith Group of Institutions.

content.Placements: About 50% of students were placed. Many companies recruit students here. More than 10 hospitals offer internships to every batch. BHMS doctor was the top role. We could open homoeopathic clinics.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities were available. It had well-equipped classrooms, labs, and a library. Free Wi-Fi was available on the whole campus. The food was tasty and hygienic. Medical facilities were available. Sports and games were conducted.
content.Faculty: Teachers were useful in classrooms and outside. They were always available. They were well-qualified and knowledgeable. Sometimes, exams are difficult.

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this college because of good teaching.

content.Placements: The salary package depended upon students. The internships in our college hospital are excellent for Ayurveda treatments, and the panchakarma treatment facility in our college is provided. Homeopathy college is also excellent for study. The engineering and MCA department is also excellent.
content.Infrastructure: This college provides a very good hostel. Hospital is very good, and the campus is full of enjoyment. All department students are supportive. The gym facility is available which is good, and the campus is very clean.
content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable. The teaching quality is excellent, and the exam is yearly conduct by Gujarat Ayurved University Jamnagar. The preliminary exam is conducted by this college, and the difficulty level is medium. This college is excellent.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college to get educated.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are somehow less, but the effort from faculty is much more for the placements. The highest salary offered was Rs. 15,000 per month and the lowest salary offered was Rs. 8,000 per month. Top requiring companies like Jyoti CNC, GNL Tech, Pooja Sales and Pelican Industries visit our campus for placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is quite good. There is a seperate building for the different courses. There is a huge canteen area in our college. The college provides two huge ground one for cricket and football and another for other games. There is also a facility of homeopathic hospital in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied with the principal and HODs.

content.Placements: The college does not provide placement opportunities for students. Many times I requested our placement teacher to help me to provide a job opportunity, but unfortunately, neither college nor he helped me to get a job. College never thinks about students future, but the only matter is money.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was very beautiful, but the thing is you have to struggle to access all these areas. The college always gets confused about food, and many times food contractors change. Less amount of equipment is provided for sports. The gym facility was not suitable for college students.

review_summary.college_name: JKK Nattraja College of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: About my college.

content.Placements: There are more students with good scores placed in our college, and the lowest package for students is 120,000, while the highest package is 210,000. The hostel fee structure for all students is 50,000, and tuition fees vary from others.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is well-developed, with lab facilities for proper understanding and well-equipped classrooms for students, including projectors. The hostels are separate for boys and girls; the boys' hostel is located outside the campus, while the girls' hostel is inside the campus. The food in the hostel is average, but the infrastructure is good with all facilities for students' comfort.

individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of really good infrastructure and faculty members, etc.

content.Placements: Only less than 10 percent of students get placement. Medplus and Apollo are the top recruiting companies. In B. Pharma, there are very few or no internship programs. Industrial pharmacists in the industry sector and drug inspectors are the top roles offered in the course.
content.Infrastructure: There are fewer facilities available but the college infrastructure is very good. The campus is surrounded by free Wi-Fi, 300+ classrooms, well-maintained libraries, etc. The hostels are very good but less well maintained but they have very good food and facilities. The girls hostel is inside the campus and the boys hostel is outside the campus.

individual_reviews.title: Our college is good at sports and studies.

content.Placements: In our college, almost 75% of students are placed in our course. The lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Apollo Hospitals, etc., visit our campus. Almost 80% of students get internships at specific companies in pharmacy, medical coding, hospital pharmacy, pharmacovigilance, and abroad jobs.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has many labs with chemicals and instruments to study and learn about. The hostel facilities are available. The food is not good.
content.Faculty: The teaching quality is good. Our teachers are helpful and qualified. The course curriculum is relevant. The semester exams are difficult. The pass percentage is 80%.

individual_reviews.title: Review of JKK Nattraja College of Pharmacy.

content.Placements: Almost 70% of students got placed in our course. The average salary package offered is 2 LPA. Almost 80% of students got internships in the medicinal field.
content.Infrastructure: All classrooms are not good. All laboratories are without equipment. Every library has limited books. The hostel has insufficient bathrooms. The food served in the hostel is not good. Our college always supports us in sports and games. Medical facilities are fewer in our college. The lab facilities are average.
content.Faculty: All teachers always reduce our internal marks and suspend us. They are not helpful to us in our studies. We take risks in studies. The course does not make students industry-ready. Semester exams are easy to study. The pass percentage is 90%.

individual_reviews.title: Overall, It is a good college.

content.Placements: You will find better placements in this college. Around 50% is required for this course. The maximum salary package offered was 2.50 LPA. The minimum salary package offered was 1.80 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Sun Pharma and Cipla. Almost 80% of students got internships in this course. The top role offered is pharmacist.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not good. We also have access to Wi-Fi. The food served in the canteen is good. Sports are encouraged in this college. Laboratory is not good. It also provides a decent library and several books are available.
